input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Pekko 2.0.0-M1 removed many deprecated APIs; org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, and TypedProps are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 actor jar, so tests must not reuse those 1.1.5 coverage paths.

If generated tests intentionally exercise the async DNS default-nameserver fallback, that path reflects on sun.net.dns.ResolverConfiguration and may require --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED for JVM/native runs; this is optional path-specific setup, not required for baseline actor coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or environment/system property is required for meaningful coverage of org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1. The resolved artifact only depends on scala-library and typesafe-config, and normal actor-system/Props/serialization/dispatcher coverage can run in-process. The observed failure is caused by stale tests using removed deprecated classic TypedActor APIs, not missing setup.
